calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Darrell Salomon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Cantley, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Columbia Mechanical Contractors, Inc.
Default entered against defendant on November 20, 2007.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at prove-up hearing filed on April 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, May 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Cantley, and against the Defaulted Defendant Columbia Mechanical Contractors, Inc. as follows:

Prejudgment Interest - $61.64.
Costs - $281.64, for a total of $281.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
